QW-401  GENERAL — QUALIFICATION PROVISIONS. (a) The Manufacturer is responsible for welding performed by their organization and for welder qualification in accordance with QW-300. (b) Welding procedures shall be qualified as required by QW-200 before production use. (c) Qualification records shall be maintained as required by UG-93. Performance qualification shall be renewed when a welder has not welded for six months, unless exempted by this paragraph. See QW-301 for tests. Qualification range is subject to QW-310. For base metal groups, refer to QW-403.
